FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Crop Blight
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A mysterious blight has struck the fields. Crops wither and blacken before they can be harvested, and a foul smell hangs over the farmland.
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.optionDescription: A blight is sweeping through the crops. Fields that were green and full yesterday are now black and rotting. How do you respond?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Burn the affected fields and replant from scratch.
Attempt to salvage what you can. It's risky, but we can't afford to lose everything.
Request agricultural aid from the faction. Experts may know how to stop this.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Fields Cleared
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The infected crops have been burned to ash. The loss is painful, but the blight is contained. New seedlings will take time to grow.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Partial Salvage
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Workers managed to save a portion of the harvest. It's not a good season, but it could have been far worse.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Blight Spreads
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The salvage attempt failed catastrophically. Workers inadvertently spread the blight to healthy fields. The entire harvest is lost.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Expert Intervention
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Agricultural experts arrived and identified the blight. With targeted treatment, much of the crop was saved and protocols are in place to prevent recurrence.
